data.current_description: Returns a random dad joke. Response format depends on Accept header.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a random dad joke in the format specified by the Accept header (JSON, plain text, or HTML). The response includes the joke ID, joke text, and HTTP status. Supports custom User-Agent header for identification.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about what formats are supported and what fields are returned. Adding details about Accept header options, response structure, and User-Agent header support improves AI agent understanding of available options and expected outputs.
